nasb.text: Now when He was in Jerusalem at the Passover, during the feast, many believed in His name, observing His signs which He was doing.

esv.text: Now when he was in Jerusalem at the Passover Feast, many believed in his name when they saw the signs that he was doing.

cnv.text: 耶穌在耶路撒冷過逾越節的時候，許多人看見他所行的神蹟，就信了他的名。

ccb.text: 耶稣在耶路撒冷过逾越节期间，许多人看见祂行的神迹，就信了祂。

csbs.text: 当耶稣在耶路撒冷过逾越节的时候，许多人看见他所行的这些神迹，就信了他的名。
